nodes.name: Venezuelan flycatcher
nodes.summary: Venezuelan flycatcher（Venezuelan flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus venezuelensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿普雷州
nodes.summary: 阿普雷州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Yellow-crested manakin、Rufous-headed pygmy tyrant、Venezuelan flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉
nodes.summary: 委內瑞拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联641种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、灰䳍、白喉䳍等641种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯
nodes.summary: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Antillean nighthawk、Cinnamon becard、Black-tailed myiobius等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 哥伦比亚
nodes.summary: 哥伦比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联947种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、灰䳍、白喉䳍等947种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Venezuelan flycatcher (Myiarchus venezuelensis) is a passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Venezuela, and on Tobago.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Venezuelan flycatcher (Myiarchus venezuelensis) is a passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Venezuela, and on Tobago.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Venezuelan flycatcher (Myiarchus venezuelensis) is a passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Venezuela, and on Tobago.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: BLI then shows the range extending south to central Apure; Hilty does not show that. The Venezuelan flycatcher inhabits a variety of landscapes; throughout in most it is especially associated with the understory of deciduous and semi-deciduous woodlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in clearings and the edges of both dry and moist forest, in gallery forest, in pastures with scattered trees and scrub, and in anthropogenic landscapes such as plantations, gardens, and parks

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In its isolated eastern Venezuelan range it is found within deciduous woodland bordered by dry savanna and wet evergreen forest. In Colombia it also occurs in mangroves. In elevation it ranges from sea level to in Colombia and to about in Venezuela

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In its isolated eastern Venezuelan range it is found within deciduous woodland bordered by dry savanna and wet evergreen forest. In Colombia it also occurs in mangroves. In elevation it ranges from sea level to in Colombia and to about in Venezuela
